issue_summary: Allow DrillSideways users to pass a CollectorManager without requiring an ExecutorService (and concurrent DrillSideways approach).
javadoc_after:
/** * Search, collecting hits with a {@link Collector}, and computing drill down and sideways counts. * *

Note that "concurrent" drill sideways will not be invoked here, even if an {@link * ExecutorService} was supplied to the ctor, since {@code Collector}s are not thread-safe. If * interested in concurrent drill sideways, please use one of the other static {@code search} * methods. */
